title: post api auth register new user
description: Test user registration with valid email, password, and name to receive 201 Created and userId.

title: post api auth login user
description: Test user login with valid credentials to receive 200 OK and JWT token.

title: get api auth me user profile
description: Test retrieval of current user profile with valid JWT token to receive 200 OK with user details and roles.

title: post api families create family
description: Test creation of a new family group with valid JWT token and payload to receive 201 Created with familyId.

title: get api families familyid details
description: Test retrieval of family details and member list with valid JWT token and existing familyId to receive 200 OK.

title: post api documents upload document
description: Test uploading a document with valid JWT token, multipart file, and metadata to receive 201 Created with documentId and processing status.

title: get api documents family familyid list
description: Test retrieval of all documents for a family with valid JWT token and family membership to receive 200 OK with document list and OCR text.
